$comment: MCP Server Configuration Template — Replace ALL placeholder values before use.

code-review-graph.$comment: Knowledge graph for token-efficient code reviews. Requires: pip install code-review-graph (Python 3.10+). Run 'code-review-graph build' in your project first. Provides 22 MCP tools for blast-radius analysis, impact detection, architecture overview, and more. See: https://github.com/tirth8205/code-review-graph
